strategy_reasoning: Uses the 'spring cleaning' metaphor to visualize technical maintenance (registry fixes) while showcasing the fun variety of new apps through character interactions. The cozy aesthetic makes heavy refactoring work feel welcoming rather than tedious.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art with chunky sprites, lime green (#ecf874) accents, and soft pastel gradients. Warm CRT glow effects.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a garden bed where 18 pixel flowers are popping back up from the soil. The flower pots are bright lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel peach and mint gradient background. Text in pixel font: 'RESTORED'. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
images.description: Polly restoring the 'garden' (registry) represents the fix that brought back 18 missing apps.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head sits on a rug, holding a glowing pixelated magic sword and a tattoo sketch. The cute bee mascot (yellow body, stripes, pink blush, blue wings) hovers nearby, looking at a holographic menu list glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft lavender and cream gradient background. Text in pixel font: 'NEW TOYS'. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
images.description: The Robot discovering new 'toys' highlights the eclectic mix of new apps (D&D, Tattoos, Obsidian).

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene. A round tan mochi-ball creature (Nomnom) with tiny dot eyes and wide happy mouth is happily eating a command line terminal window that says 'npm'. The cute bee mascot (yellow body, stripes, pink blush, blue wings) wears a tiny wizard hat and watches amused. Background features floating code blocks and soft lime green (#ecf874) sparkles. Text in pixel font: 'CLI MAGIC'. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, cozy vibes like A Short Hike.
images.description: Nomnom devouring the old package names/CLI represents the rename to 'ompc/mcp' and the new 'fuckits' tool.

caption:
24 PRs merged. We did some spring cleaning and found 18 missing apps behind the sofa (registry bug fixed). 

The ecosystem is now reorganized into 15 sensible categories so you can actually find things. We migrated Claude to direct pipes, renamed the NPM packages to save you keystrokes, and yes—someone added a 'fuckits' CLI tool. It feels spiritually correct for a Monday.

Also new: D&D magic items, tattoo designers, and Obsidian integration. Open source is weird and beautiful.

#pollinations #opensource #pixelart #indiedev #creativecoding #generativeai #buildinpublic #python
alt_text: Pixel art carousel: 1. A bee mascot watering a garden of restored pixel flowers. 2. A robot and bee looking at new digital items like swords and sketches. 3. A round creature eating a command line interface while a bee watches.
